repos.title: Self-Consistency (Paper)
repos.summary_en: Self-Consistency — the paper behind sampling-then-marginalizing for chain-of-thought. A 5-line technique that improves GSM8K by 17.9 points.
repos.summary_zh: Self-Consistency——CoT 先采样后边缘化的论文。5 行代码让 GSM8K 涨 17.9 分。

repos.title: Toolformer (Paper)
repos.summary_en: Toolformer — the paper that showed LLMs can teach themselves to call external APIs by self-supervising on whether the API call helps. The conceptual foundation of every agent framework.
repos.summary_zh: Toolformer——LLM 通过自监督学何时调 API 的论文。每个 agent 框架的概念基础。

repos.title: DeepSeek-R1 Release Notes
repos.summary_en: DeepSeek-R1 release notes — what they did to train a reasoning model with pure RL. The open release that shocked the frontier-model labs.
repos.summary_zh: DeepSeek-R1 发布说明——纯 RL 训练 reasoning model 的全过程。让前沿模型实验室震动的一次开源发布。

repos.title: State of AI 2025 (Vellum)
repos.summary_en: Vellum's 'State of AI 2025' — annual industry report with hard data: model adoption, eval practices, agent failures, and what teams are actually shipping.
repos.summary_zh: Vellum《2025 年 AI 现状》——年度行业硬数据报告：模型采用、评估实践、agent 失败、团队实际在交付什么。

repos.title: LLM Inference Handbook (BentoML)
repos.summary_en: BentoML's 'LLM Inference Handbook' — the engineering playbook for production LLM serving. Hardware sizing, batching strategies, KV-cache, and deployment patterns.
repos.summary_zh: BentoML《LLM 推理手册》——生产 LLM 推理工程实战。硬件选型、批处理策略、KV-cache、部署模式。

repos.title: openGauss Vector
repos.summary_en: openGauss's vector type — Huawei's PostgreSQL fork with vector search.
repos.summary_zh: openGauss 的 vector 类型——华为 PostgreSQL fork，带向量搜索。
